title: tournefortia candidula
intro: Tournefortia candidula, also known as the white tournefortia, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia candidula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
